name: Grandma's Legacy VR – The Mystery Puzzle Solving Escape Room Game
short_description: Mystery, puzzle solving, challenges and secrets surround your grandmother's disappearance. Explore the different rooms and unravel the unsolved secret that your grandma keeps in Grandma’s Legacy. Check our first escape room experience in VR.
detailed_description:
My grandma hasn't answered the phone for a few days, that's not normal and I think something strange could be happening. My mother doesn’t belive me and thinks is usual in her. I can’t go to the police without any evidence. I’ll go to her old house and discover the truth behind it.

There has always been something special about her, but I'm afraid something dangerous could have happened. I’m afraid that I won't be able to see her again

Mystery, puzzle solving, challenges and secrets surround your grandmother's dissapearance. Explore the diferent rooms and unravel the unsolved secret that your grandma keeps in Grandma’s Legacy. An escape room in VR.
